HERO.TITLE: Carpaccio
HERO.SUBTITLE: Where Every Moment Becomes a Memory

ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: In the heart of Jericho Gate, we blended Eastern and international cuisine with elegant indoor and outdoor settings — crafting an experience worth remembering.

SHISHA.TITLE: Shisha Lounge
SHISHA.DESCRIPTION: Enjoy a tranquil evening in our dedicated shisha lounge, featuring sophisticated vibes, premium service, and an exquisite selection of flavors.

FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT: We believe that food is the universal language of love. At Carpaccio Jericho, we combine Palestinian history with Italian traditions to bring you an unforgettable experience.
